text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I was so close! I almost had it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: At least I placed... but I was this close to being number one!
choice_data_list: You just couldn't quite close it out.
You just couldn't quite close it out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: At least I placed... but I was this close to being number one!
choice_data_list: You just couldn't quite close it out.
You just couldn't quite close it out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I! Don't! Care! It's first place or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll put on a performance I can be
proud of! You'd better praise me to high heaven,
you hear?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You think so too, huh? Well, now I'm getting fired
up!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My next race will be nothing less than perfect!
You'll see!
